summary: Full frontend UI/integration testing of static landing page. All 12 requested features verified successfully with no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All Selar/WhatsApp CTA hrefs are placeholders (YOUR-PROMPT-PACK-LINK, wa.me/234XXXXXXXXXX). Confirmed intended per problem statement — replace before production.
App.js is a single ~895 line file. Consider splitting section components into separate files for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only landing page. All data-testid selectors verified: nav links, hero CTAs, 4 product cards (prompt-pack, playbook, os, implementation), Most Popular badge on os, 6 feature items, 3 testimonials, FAQ toggle open/close, final CTA, footer social+whatsapp+explore. Mobile responsive at 390px confirmed: cards stack vertically, mobile toggle works. SEO title/meta/OG tags all present. Zero console/page errors.
